name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For insurance brokers managing 5–15 clients, missed policy renewals cause client dissatisfaction. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking insurance policy renewals for multiple clients.
